Event: Cornucopia Island December 2025
Event Date: 24/12/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: T187


Other locations the gear can be found
Cornucopia Alliance Challenge
Special Present Totem

For the duration of the battle, incoming damage against the totem's owner and all allied units in a small radius around them is reduced by 20%.

When the totem's owner receives 500000 damage, all their stats are increased by 5% for 3 sec. Stacks up to 8 times.

- Level 20
For the duration of the battle, incoming damage against the totem's owner and all allied units in a small radius around them is reduced by 25%.

When the totem's owner receives 500000 damage, all their stats are increased by 10% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 8 times.

- Level 40
For the duration of the battle, incoming damage against the totem's owner and all allied units in a small radius around them is reduced by 30%.

When the totem's owner receives 500000 damage, all their stats are increased by 15% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 8 times.

Requirements: 90
